reasoning: The Lean signature uses `[Fintype G] [Group G]` with `card G = 105` (from `open Fintype`, giving `Fintype.card G = 105`), which precisely captures |G| = 105. I confirmed in `Mathlib/GroupTheory/Sylow.lean` that `Sylow p G` extends `Subgroup G` and `P.Normal` is the standard Mathlib predicate for a Sylow subgroup being a normal subgroup (used throughout that file).
